recipes.title: Peanut Butter & Jelly Ice Cream
ingredients: Mix-ins: 2 tbsp sugar free strawberry jelly
instructions: Blend all ingredients for the base and freeze (at least 16 hours)
Run your pint under hot water for at least 60 seconds
Spin on "Ice Cream" setting
Spin on "Respin" setting
Respin again if powdery
Make a hole down to the bottom with a butter knife and fill with the strawberry jelly
Run the "Mix-in" cycle

recipes.title: Recettes Ninja Creami (5 versions)
ingredients: Peanut butter & chocolat: 300ml lait demi-écrémé, un peu d'édulcorant, 15g pb2, 2g gomme de xanthane (facultatif), 15g peanut butter, 10g de pépites de chocolat
Spéculos Lotus: 300ml lait demi-écrémé, un peu d'édulcorant, 20g pâte de spéculos (Lotus ici), 2g gomme de xanthane (facultatif), 1 spéculos émietté
Vanille protéinée: 300ml lait demi-écrémé, un peu d'édulcorant, 20g protéine en poudre vegan à la vanille (vegan pour la texture), 2g gomme de xanthane (facultatif)
Chocolat noir protéinée: 300ml lait demi-écrémé, un peu d'édulcorant, 20g protéine en poudre vegan chocolat (vegan pour la texture), 10g cacao non sucré, 2g gomme de xanthane (facultatif)

Frozen Yogurt: 100g fromage blanc/skyr, 250ml d'eau, un peu d'édulcorant, 20g protéine en poudre vegan vanille (vegan pour la texture), 2g gomme de xanthane (facultatif), qq framboises surgelées (bonus)
instructions: Peanut butter & chocolat: Mélanger les ingrédients de base, 12-24h au congel, puis option light ice cream, ajouter 15g peanut butter & 10g de pépites de chocolat & respin 1-2x
Spéculos Lotus: Mélanger les ingrédients de base, 12-24h au congel, puis option light ice cream, ajouter 1 spéculos émietté & respin 1-2x
Vanille protéinée: Mélanger les ingrédients de base, 12-24h au congel, puis option light ice cream, décoller les bords avec un couteau & respin 1-2x
Chocolat noir protéinée: Mélanger les ingrédients de base, 12-24h au congel, puis option light ice cream, décoller les bords avec un couteau & respin 1-2x

Frozen Yogurt: Mélanger les ingrédients de base, 12-24h au congel, puis option light ice cream, décoller les bords avec un couteau & respin 1-2x (bonus: ajouter qq framboises surgelées avant la dégustation)
recipes.prepNotes: 12-24h au congélateur avant de passer en machine. Utiliser l'option 'light ice cream' puis respin 1-2x. La gomme de xanthane est facultative. Utiliser de la protéine vegan pour la texture.
recipes.source: Recettes préférées avec la Ninja Creami (publication Instagram/réseau social)

recipes.title: Vanilla Caramel Fudge Protein Ice Cream
ingredients: 40-45g Lakanto Classic White Monk Fruit Sweetener
15g Lakanto Sugar Free Chocolate Chips mixed with 2g of coconut oil (mix-in/topping)
instructions: Blend all ingredients for the base and freeze (at least 16 hours)
Run your pint under hot water for at least 60 seconds
Spin on "Lite Ice Cream" setting
Spin on "Respin" setting if very powdery
Make a hole down to the bottom with a butter knife and add the melted chocolate
Run the "Mix-in" cycle
Top with the caramel sauce
recipes.prepNotes: Right before the Mix-In cycle, combine the chocolate with the coconut oil, melt in the microwave (30 sec intervals, stirring in between), hollow out a hole in the center of the base, and pour in. After spinning on the Mix-In setting, it'll turn into perfect, creamy chocolate chips. Nutrition: 231 calories, 23g protein, 16g C, 6g F for the entire pint including toppings/mix-ins.

recipes.title: **Snickers Ice Cream 2
instructions: Add all ingredients (except toppings) to your container. Whisk until smooth, then freeze flat and level for 24 hours.
Mix on Ice Cream setting
Then add another splash of milk and press Re-Spin 1-2 times until you have a creamy consistency.
add the chocolate sauce and peanuts on top as a topping.

recipes.title: Chocolate Chip Cookie Dough Ice Cream
ingredients: 400g fat free ultra-filtered milk (or any fat free milk)
½ of a package of the @fuulsnacks Chocolate Chip Cookie Dough bites
instructions: Blend all ingredients for the base and freeze (at least 16 hours)
Prep your chocolate ganache (ingredients above)
Run your pint under hot water for at least 60 seconds
Spin on "Lite Ice Cream" setting
Respin again if very powdery
Make a hole down to the bottom with a butter knife and fill with the ganache and half of the cookie dough bites
Run the "Mix-in" cycle
Top with the rest of the cookie dough bites
recipes.prepNotes: To make the ganache, combine 5g of unsweetened cocoa powder with 10g of sugar free syrup (I know this sounds like it wouldn't work, but trust me... it does).

recipes.title: Healthy Watermelon Sorbet
recipes.servings: 1 pint (120 calories, 2g protein for the entire pint)
instructions: Blend all ingredients for the base and freeze (at least 16 hours)
Run your pint under hot water for at least 60 seconds
Spin on "Sorbet" setting
Spin on "Respin" setting until it reaches your desired consistency
recipes.prepNotes: Nutrition: 120 cal, 28g C, 1g F, 2g P. Made with the Ninja Creami. Freeze base for at least 16 hours before spinning.

recipes.title: Cookies 'n Cream Cheesecake Ice Cream
ingredients: 30g cheesecake bites (~100 calories worth of any cheesecake, chopped into bite size pieces)
instructions: Blend all ingredients for the base and freeze (at least 16 hours)
At the same time, put the cheesecake bites and Oreos into the freezer. This allows it to firm up and withstand the power of the Mix-in setting (so it doesn't get completely pulverized)
Run your pint under hot water for at least 60 seconds
Spin on "Ice Cream" setting
Spin on "Respin" setting if very powdery
Make a hole down to the bottom with a butter knife and add the frozen cheesecake bites and Oreos
Run the "Mix-in" cycle
recipes.prepNotes: 355 calories 26g protein for the entire pint, toppings/mix-ins included. All recipe books (200+ flavors) are in the creator's bio.

recipes.title: Chocolate Chip Cookie Cheesecake Protein Ice Cream
ingredients: 5g (1 tsp) Nielsen Massey vanilla bean paste
3 Simple Mills chocolate chip cookies (can sub with any crunchy chocolate chip cookies)
instructions: Blend all ingredients for the base and freeze (at least 16 hours)
Place your cookies in a plastic bag and freeze alongside your pint (this allows them to firm up and not get pulverized by the Mix-in setting)
Run your pint under hot water for at least 60 seconds
Spin on "Lite Ice Cream" setting
Spin on "Respin" setting if very powdery
Make a hole down to the bottom with a butter knife and add the frozen cookies
Run the "Mix-in" cycle
recipes.prepNotes: 296 cal, 23g C, 11g F, 24g P for the entire pint including toppings/mix-ins. All recipe books (200+ flavors) are in bio. Made with Ninja Kitchen Creami.

recipes.title: Test recipe
instructions: Mix all and freeze
recipes.prepNotes: Will this work???

recipes.title: Chocolate Therapy
instructions: Blend all ingredients until smooth
Freeze for at least 24 hours without Lid
Leave tub to soften for 10-15 minutes
Warm tub edges under hot water briefly
Run "Lite Ice Cream" mode
Add 2 x Oreo thins
Run "Mix-In" mode (Re-spin if needed)

recipes.title: Chocolate Brownie Ice Cream
instructions: Combine the base ingredients: cookies & cream whey, greek yogurt, almond milk, cocao powder, agave, and xanthan gum.
Blend/freeze.
Mix in 1 brownie.

recipes.title: Reese's Peanut Butter Ice Cream
instructions: Combine milk, vanilla protein, peanut butter powder, butterscotch pudding mix, vanilla extract, and salt.
Mix well and pour into a pint container.
Freeze, then process until smooth and creamy.

recipes.title: Snickerdoodle Ice Cream
ingredients: 1 cup unsweetened oat, almond, or milk of choice
¼ tsp ground cream of tartar (classic snickerdoodle tang)
1–2 tsp cashew or almond butter (optional, but goooood)
instructions: Blend the milk, protein powder, collagen, cinnamon, nutmeg, cream of tartar, sweetener, vanilla, and salt until fully smooth.
Pour into a tub, cover, and freeze 12–24 hours.
Spin on Lite Ice Cream.
Add 1–2 tbsp milk and "Re-Spin".
recipes.prepNotes: Cashew or almond butter is optional but recommended.

recipes.title: Chocolate Cheesecake Ice Cream
instructions: Blend cottage cheese, almond milk, Medjool dates, and cocoa powder to form the base.
Freeze and spin
Top with strawberries and honey.

recipes.title: Chocolate Pistachio Ice Cream
instructions: Combine base ingredients
Freeze
Process then add pistachio bites as mix-ins

recipes.title: Vanilla Biscoff Ice Cream
instructions: Combine base ingredients (vanilla whey, banana, oats, PB powder, Greek yogurt, whole milk, and almond milk) and blend.
Freeze the base
Process until smooth and creamy.
Add Lotus biscuits as mix-ins and re-spin if desired.
Top with crumbled Lotus biscuits and serve.

recipes.title: Salted Maple Pecan Ice Cream
instructions: Mix in: crushed up pecans

recipes.title: Tiramisu Ice Cream
ingredients: 2 heaped tsp (~5g) instant coffee (brewed with 1 tbsp hot water)
instructions: Place all ingredients (apart from cacao) in pint & use hand mixer.
Freeze overnight.
When making, run pint under water for 10 seconds.
Press scoop, then Lite Icecream.
Dust with cacao powder, scoop & enjoy!
recipes.prepNotes: if icy just re-spin, do not add more liquid.

recipes.title: Espresso Chip Ice Cream
instructions: add milk, espresso, vanilla protein
Freeze for 12+ hours
Blend on "lite ice cream" setting and respin
Add chopped coffee beans and chocolate chips

recipes.title: Caramel Pecan Ice Cream
instructions: Add all ingredients to a container except the last two, shake to combine, then freeze for 24 hours
Use the "light ice cream", then add a tbsp of unsweetened almond milk
Scoop the middle and add the pecans and biscoff, and use the "re-spin" setting

recipes.title: Peanut Butter Ice Cream 2
ingredients: Mix in - 1/4 Bar - Sea Salt Extra Dark Chocolate
Mix in- 1/4 Bar - Peanut Butter Madness
instructions: Blend all ingredients for the base and freeze (at least 10-12 hours, depending on your freezer)
Spin on "lite ice cream" setting
Do ONE "re-spin" if necessary
Make a hole down to the bottom with a butter knife and fill with toppings
Run the "mix-in" cycle

recipes.title: Snickers Ice Cream 1
ingredients: 1 tbsp sugar free chocolate instant pudding mix
1 tbsp sugar free chocolate caramel coffee syrup
instructions: Mix together all ingredients except Snickers
Freeze 24 hours.
Spin on lite ice cream. Add 1 tbsp. milk and respin 1-2x.
Add in 1/2 chopped snickers bar.
Spin on mixin.

recipes.title: Blueberry Vanilla Ice Cream
ingredients: 1/2 Tb sugar free vanilla jello pudding mix
instructions: Add milk, protein powder, and jello mix to container and blend until smooth.
Add blueberries and stir with spoon.
Put lid on and freeze for 12-24 hours.
I blend mine once using light ice cream and one more time using the mix in setting!

recipes.title: Oreo McFlurry Ice Cream
instructions: Blend all ingredients for the base and freeze (at least 16 hours)
Run your pint under hot water for at least 60 seconds
Spin on "Lite Ice Cream" setting
Spin on "Respin" setting if very powdery
Make a hole down to the bottom with a butter knife and fill with the Oreos
Run the "Mix-in" cycle

recipes.title: Ben and Jerry's Cake Batter Ice Cream
ingredients: 40-45g Lakanto Classic White Monk Fruit sweetener
15g chocolate chips mixed with 2g of coconut oil (mix-in)
instructions: Blend all ingredients for the base and freeze (at least 16 hours)
Run your pint under hot water for at least 60 seconds
Spin on "Ice Cream" setting
Spin on "Respin" setting if very powdery
Make a hole down to the bottom with a butter knife and fill with the melted chocolate
Run the "Mix-in" cycle
Top with the chocolate frosting
recipes.prepNotes: Right before the Mix-In cycle, combine the chocolate with the coconut oil, melt in the microwave (30 sec intervals, stirring in between), hollow out a hole in the center of the base, and pour in. After spinning on the Mix-In setting, it'll turn into perfect, creamy chocolate chips. To make the chocolate frosting, combine 15g of unsweetened cocoa powder with 30g of sugar free syrup (I know this sounds like it wouldn't work, but trust me... it does).

recipes.title: Pistachio Ice Cream
instructions: Combine the ingredients for the ice cream in a blender until smooth. Transfer into the tub and freeze overnight.
Mix the on the Lite Ice Cream setting.
Respin as many times as needed until you reach the desired consistency, adding in 1 tbsp milk before each respin.
Add in the pistachios and hit Mix In.

recipes.title: **Vanilla Bean FroYo
instructions: Blend all ingredients for the base and freeze (at least 16 hours)
Run your pint under hot water for at least 60 seconds
Spin on "Lite Ice Cream" setting
Spin on "Respin" setting until it reaches your desired texture

recipes.title: Chocolate Ice Cream 2
ingredients: 1 tsp date paste or honey (to taste)

recipes.title: Barebells Ice Cream
instructions: Blend all ingredients for the base and freeze (at least 16 hours)
Run your pint under hot water for at least 60 seconds
Spin on "Lite Ice Cream" setting
Spin on "Respin" setting if very powdery
Right before the Mix-In cycle, microwave the Barebells bar for 10-20 seconds, hollow out a hole in the center of the base, and dump in.
Make a hole down to the bottom with a butter knife and fill with the melty Barebells
Run the "Mix-in" cycle

recipes.title: Cafe Latte
instructions: Mix all ingredients and pour into tub
Freeze x 24 hrs
Spin on light ice cream setting. Add 2 tbsp vanilla shake and re-spin

recipes.title: Frozen Yoghurt
ingredients: 25–50 g light agave syrup or pure maple syrup
instructions: Whisk all ingredients together (mixing in a separate bowl helps remove air lumps), then pour into the tub.
Freeze 16–24 hours with the lid off.
Let sit on the bench 5–15 minutes before processing.
Process on the light ice cream function — generally needs two spins.
Store leftovers in the freezer with the lid on.
recipes.prepNotes: Use a yoghurt that's already sweetened. Approx. 48g protein with Danone high protein vanilla yoghurt + high protein skim milk.

recipes.title: Cookie Dough Ice Cream
ingredients: 150 g sweetened condensed milk (not evaporated milk)
1 tsp vanilla bean paste or extract
20–40 ml + 1–2 tbsp milk of choice, as needed
1 tsp vanilla bean paste or extract
instructions: Vanilla ice cream: Whisk cream, condensed milk, milk, vanilla together in a bowl, let sit 5 minutes, whisk again.
Pour into a tub and freeze with the lid off, 16–24 hours.
Cookie dough (30–60 min before processing): Brown the butter in a saucepan over low-medium heat until golden and nutty-smelling.
Pour over brown sugar in a heatproof bowl; cool 5 minutes.
Add 1 tbsp milk and stir to a syrupy brown liquid.
Add tapioca flour in batches until it forms a non-oily, rollable dough (add more milk if it crumbles).
Cool, then stir in chopped chocolate. Roll into balls or leave as crumbles; chill at least 10 minutes.
To assemble: Process the frozen ice cream base on the ice cream function (re-spin if balled up).
Fold chilled cookie dough into the spun ice cream in a large bowl.
Pack back into the tub; freeze ~20 minutes until firm. Serve.
recipes.prepNotes: Cookie dough should be prepared 30–60 minutes before processing the ice cream base.

recipes.title: Maple Pumpkin Ice Cream
instructions: Whisk ingredients together in a bowl; taste and adjust maple syrup to taste.
Pour into the tub and freeze with the lid off, 16–24 hours.
Process on the ice cream function; re-spin if needed.
Return leftovers to the freezer with the lid on.
recipes.prepNotes: Homemade pumpkin puree is sweeter than canned, so needs less maple syrup. Stick to 75–100g maple syrup for proper texture.

recipes.title: Sticky Date Ice Cream
ingredients: 100 g regular pitted dates, finely chopped
1/2–1 tsp vanilla bean extract, to taste
30 g whey protein isolate with minimal sweetener
instructions: Place chopped dates in a heatproof bowl; sprinkle with baking soda and pour over boiling water. Stir and cool.
Transfer cooled date paste to a food processor with milk, salt, and vanilla; blend to desired consistency.
Return mixture to the bowl and whisk in the whey protein isolate (do not blend the protein — it gets too frothy).
Pour into the tub and freeze with the lid off, 16–24 hours.
Process on the light ice cream function; re-spin if needed. Serve immediately; return leftovers to the freezer with the lid on.
recipes.prepNotes: 3g baking soda for subtle flavour, 5g for a classic sticky date note. Do not substitute baking powder. Avoid high-sugar protein powders — too much sugar will prevent proper freezing.

recipes.title: Watermelon Sorbet
ingredients: 400 g watermelon, chopped into small cubes
25 g lime juice (or more, to taste)
instructions: Blend all ingredients (and optional add-ins) until completely smooth.
Pour into the tub (don't exceed fill line) and freeze with the lid off, 16–24 hours.
Process on the gelato function; re-spin once or twice as needed.
Return leftovers to the freezer with the lid on; re-spin on the gelato function before eating.

recipes.title: Coffee Ice Cream
ingredients: 50 g fresh espresso, cooled for 5 minutes
100 g full fat milk (regular or lactose free)
instructions: Whisk all ingredients together in a bowl until completely smooth.
Pour into the tub; optionally chill in the fridge 3 hours to minimize the hump, then freeze with the lid off, 16–24 hours.
Process on the ice cream function; smooth a balled-up top with a spoon, or re-spin once if powdery (avoid over-processing — it can split the cream).

recipes.title: Coconut Ice Cream
ingredients: 175–200 g full fat or light coconut milk
Dash of vanilla bean paste or extract (optional)
instructions: Whisk all ingredients together; taste and adjust salt/vanilla.
Pour into the tub and freeze with the lid off, 12–24 hours.
Let thaw 10 minutes before processing (optional, reduces need to re-spin).
Process on the ice cream function; re-process (no added liquid) if powdery or balled up.
Store leftovers in the freezer with the lid on.
recipes.prepNotes: Choose coconut cream with ~20–25g fat per 100g.

recipes.title: Custard Ice Cream
ingredients: 3 extra large eggs (150g out of shell)
instructions: Whisk eggs, sugar, and cream together in a heat-proof bowl.
Heat milk, vanilla, and salt in a saucepan until hot and just below a simmer.
Slowly pour the hot milk into the egg mixture while whisking.
Pour the combined mixture back into the saucepan and cook over low/medium heat, stirring constantly, until it thickens slightly (about 70°C, ~5 minutes).
If it starts to clump, remove from heat immediately and whisk vigorously; transfer out of the pot to stop cooking.
Cool slightly, then transfer to the tub and freeze 16–24 hours with the lid off.
Spin on the ice cream function — needs two full spins to be perfect.
recipes.prepNotes: 4 eggs can be used for higher protein. Lower sugar to 50g if mixture is too soft.

recipes.title: Strawberry Ricotta Ice Cream
instructions: Blend strawberries to a smooth puree. Add remaining ingredients and pulse to combine until smooth and light pink.
Pour into the tub and freeze 16–24 hours with the lid off.
Process on the ice cream function — needs 3 spins for ideal texture.

recipes.title: Chocolate Caramel Ice Cream
instructions: Whisk cocoa with boiling water in a saucepan to remove clumps.
Add remaining ingredients and whisk to combine; crush any caramel chunks.
Cook on low heat 2–5 minutes until caramel is dissolved. Cool slightly.
Pour into the tub and freeze 16–24 hours with the lid off.
Process on the ice cream function — may need two spins.
Mix in chopped chocolate caramel eggs by hand (not via the mix-in function).
Return leftovers to the freezer with the lid on.

recipes.title: Sugar Free Strawberry Ice Cream
ingredients: 300 g fresh strawberries, weighed after hulling
Optional: Few cracks freshly cracked black pepper
instructions: Hull, chop, and mash strawberries in a pot to release liquid.
Add allulose and stir to combine.
Cook over medium heat 2–3 minutes until allulose dissolves and mixture is a vibrant red coulis. Stir in any flavour boosters, then cool 15 minutes.
Transfer cooled mixture to the tub.
Add cream and mix thoroughly.
Freeze with the lid off, 16–24 hours.
Process on the ice cream function — should be perfect on first spin with 100–125g allulose.
Return leftovers to the fridge with the lid on.
recipes.prepNotes: Do not exceed 125g allulose — the mixture won't set. Less sweet strawberries may need more allulose; very sweet ones may need only 75–100g.

recipes.title: Sugar Free Lemon Sorbet
instructions: Mix allulose and stevia in a saucepan; rub in lemon zest.
Add water and salt, then lemon juice to taste.
Cook 1–3 minutes until allulose dissolves. Cool slightly.
Pour into the tub and freeze with the lid off, 24 hours.
Process on the sorbet function; re-spin once if needed (avoid spinning twice — can make it too soft).
Return leftovers to the freezer with the lid on; re-process before eating.
recipes.prepNotes: Use common sour lemons rather than Meyer/Lemonade lemons for the classic tart flavour.

recipes.title: Healthier Orange Creamsicle Protein Ice Cream
instructions: Combine ingredients and freeze 12–24 hours.
Spin on the Lite Ice Cream setting.
Add 1 tbsp milk and re-spin 1–2x until smooth.
recipes.prepNotes: tastes like a copycat DQ Orange Julius

recipes.title: **Apple Butter Biscoff Protein Ice Cream
ingredients: 1–2 tbsp apple butter or apple pie filling
Pinch of cinnamon/nutmeg or apple pie spice (not too much!)
instructions: Mix base ingredients together in a Ninja Creami pint and freeze 24 hours.
Once frozen, spin on the Lite Ice Cream setting.
Respin if needed.
Add in apple butter and Biscoff cookies as mix-ins and spin on respin.

recipes.title: Sweet Potato Ice Cream
ingredients: 150 g sweetened condensed milk (not evaporated milk)
instructions: Whisk all ingredients together until smooth and spices are integrated.
Pour into the tub and freeze 16–24 hours with the lid off.
Process on the ice cream function. Re-spin for a fluffier texture if desired.
recipes.prepNotes: Sweet potato must be 100% puree, no added sugar/syrup. Canned sweet potato not tested.

recipes.title: Classic Ice Cream Base Recipe
ingredients: 1 tbsp cream cheese (optional — makes the ice cream thicker)
instructions: Mix all ingredients together in a pint tub and freeze 24 hours
Once frozen, spin on the ice cream setting.
The ice cream will come out slightly crumbly — add 1 tbsp milk and respin.
recipes.prepNotes: For a thicker, still-creamy texture, freeze an additional 1–3 hours.

recipes.title: Peanut Butter Ice Cream 1
instructions: mix all and pour in tub

recipes.title: Chocolate Ice Cream 1
instructions: Heat milk and sugar to melt
Add cream and vanilla
Pour into tub

pantry: extra large eggs (150g out of shell)
optional: few cracks freshly cracked black pepper
–50 g light agave syrup or pure maple syrup
of vanilla bean paste or extract (optional)
full fat milk (regular or lactose free)
of cinnamon/nutmeg or apple pie spice (not too much!)
heaped tsp (~5g) instant coffee (brewed with 1 tbsp hot water)
chocolate chips mixed with 2g of coconut oil (mix-in)
unsweetened oat, almond, or milk of choice
